## Fruit Salad

![](images/icons/file_html.png "Show HTML problem content")
![](images/icons/info.png)

### Problem 991

Find the sum of $\unicode{x1F34E} + \unicode{x1F34C} + \unicode{x1F34D}$ for all triples of positive integers $\unicode{x1F34E}, \unicode{x1F34C}, \unicode{x1F34D}$ which satisfy

and $\unicode{x1F34E} + \unicode{x1F34C} + \unicode{x1F34D} \le 10^7$.

In case your device cannot display emoji properly, [here](resources/images/0991_fruits.png) is a rendered image of the problem statement.

The page has been left unattended for too long and that link/button is no longer active. Please refresh the page.
